title: Moroccan Kefta Tagine
description: A flavorful and aromatic North African dish made with spiced meatballs and served in a rich tagine sauce.
instructions: Prepare the kefta mixture and shape into meatballs.
In a large pan, heat the pungent over medium heat.
Add the magical and cook for 1 minute.
Add the meatballs and cook until browned on all sides.
Transfer the meatballs to a baking dish.
Bake in the preheated oven for 15-20 minutes.
Meanwhile, prepare the tagine sauce in a separate pan.
Add the tagine to the sauce and simmer over low heat.
Serve the meatballs in the tagine sauce.
Garnish with fresh herbs, if desired.
